# kSecCodeInfoFlags

**Global Variable**

A key whose value indicates the static (on-disk) state of the object.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecCodeInfoFlags: CFString
```

## Discussion

The value is a [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFNumber]. See [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecCodeSignatureFlags] for a list of possible values.
title: kSecCodeInfoFlags
